3 Liverpool youngsters who could impress Arne Slot in FA Cup clash with Plymouth
arts.sum: A winter loan move was swiftly ruled out after his display in Eindhoven and the youngster, who featured in Liverpool's Carabao Cup final victory last season, is now set to play an important role for the Reds in the coming weeks with fellow academy graduate Tyler Morton sidelined with a shoulder injury. The 16-year-old, who joined from Chelsea over the summer in a high-profile academy switch, became the Reds' youngest ever starter and most youthful FA Cup representative during the 4-0 win.
